variant: 26,000 and 30,000 lb capacity heavy duty two-post lifts (standard, airlock, and wide base variants)

installation_requirements.base_footprint: 48 in wide x 30 in (or 42 in) deep, 1 inch thick plate

features: 26,000 or 30,000 lb capacity heavy duty two-post lifts
A designation: Air-actuated mechanical lock release (airlocks)
16 x 4-inch double sealed self-lubricating steel rollers per carriage
3-stage swing arms for wide range of wheelbases
5 HP 3-phase power unit delivers fluid equally to twin cylinders
12-position mechanical safety locks of 1.5-inch thick steel
Locks engage every 6 inches from 5 inches to full height of 6 ft 7 in
Hand-held pendant control (standard) or air-actuated release (A models)

optional_equipment.description: Extended base footprint for additional stability
Optional footprint for shops with only 8-inch floors

certifications: Meets OSHA and ANSI/ALI ALCTV-2006 standards
safety_features: 12-position mechanical locks of 1.5-inch thick steel plates
Locks engage every 6 inches from 5 inches to 6 ft 7 in
Patented hydraulic locking system with velocity fuses
Air-actuated lock release with automatic re-engagement (A models)
Hand-held pendant control for safe raising and lowering
notes: Warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, limited lifetime cylinder
A = Airlock version, WB = Wide Base version
Requires 12 inches of concrete (or optional 8-inch floor footprint)
